article.title: Where to Shop for Vinyl Records Online (2026): Discogs, Bandcamp, Ebay
article.summary: Don’t just load up an Amazon cart! Here are the better ways to find your favorite vinyl records online.

article.title: Apple wins latest round in Masimo fight as ITC closes Apple Watch import ban case
article.summary: Apple just scored an important win in its ongoing battle with Masimo over patents related to the Apple Watch’s blood oxygen feature. Here are the details. more…
article.title_zh: Apple 在與 Masimo 的糾紛中贏得最新一輪勝利，ITC 關閉 Apple Watch 進口禁令案

article.title: Could See a SpaceX-Tesla Merger Before the IPO: Ray Wang
article.summary: Constellation Research CEO Ray Wang discusses the current AI landscape, why software is the ‘next piece to comeback,’ and the possibility of a SpaceX-Tesla merger. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: Ray Wang：IPO 前可能看到 SpaceX-Tesla 合併
article.summary_zh: Constellation Research 執行長 Ray Wang 討論當前 AI 格局、軟體何以成為「下個回歸之作」，以及 SpaceX-Tesla 合併的可能性。

article.title: US-sanctioned currency exchange says $15 million heist done by "unfriendly states"
article.summary: Grinex, a US-sanctioned cryptocurrency exchange registered in Kyrgyzstan, said it’s halting operations after experiencing a $13 million heist carried out by “western special services” hackers. Researchers from TRM, which has confirmed the theft, put the value of stolen assets at $15 million after discovering roughly 70 drained addresses, about 16 more than Grinex reported. Neither TRM nor fellow blockchain research firm Elliptic has said how the attackers slipped past Grinex’s defenses. Grinex said it has been under almost constant attack attempts since incorporating 16 months ago. The latest attacks, it said, targeted Russian users of the exchange. article.title_zh: 美國制裁加密貨幣交易所聲稱 1,500 萬美元盜竊由「敵對國家」實施
article.summary_zh: 美國制裁的吉爾吉斯斯坦註冊加密貨幣交易所 Grinex 在遭遇 1,300 萬美元盜竊後宣布停止營運，該盜竊據稱由「西方特別部隊」駭客實施。

article.title: How to prepare your company for the era of agentic ITops
article.summary: Rules-based IT operations cost businesses hundreds of billions of dollars every year. If your company depends on human labor to paper over where partial IT automation falls short, you know how much it costs to keep systems online, access controlled, and users properly provisioned. Agentic AI offers a better path forward. Instead of relying on brittle, partial automation, modern companies can use AI agents to keep their technology running smoothly with less human input. The result? Less downtime, faster service, and lower costs. But, as always, there’s a catch. Agentic AI is no panacea on its own. If you want to use agentic AI to automate and accelerate your IT operations, you need to get your data in order. Today, that information may be siloed, trapped in different repositories that
article.title_zh: 如何為您的公司做好 Agentic ITops 時代的準備
article.summary_zh: 基於規則的 IT 運營每年耗費企業數千億美元。Agentic AI 提供了一個解決方案，可以減少對人力的依賴，並降低系統維護、存取控制和使用者配置的成本。

article.title: Backblaze silently redefines 'unlimited' backups and users discover it's not backing up Dropbox and OneDrive — as firm leans heavier into AI storage services, changes could signal shift away from home backups
article.summary: Backblaze redefines "unlimited" while users discover it's not backing up Dropbox, OneDrive, et al
article.title_zh: Backblaze悄悄重新定義「無限」備份，用戶發現無法備份Dropbox和OneDrive——隨著公司更傾向AI存儲服務，改變可能預示著遠離家庭備份的轉變
article.summary_zh: Backblaze重新定義「無限」備份，同時用戶發現其無法備份Dropbox和OneDrive。

article.title: How to protect your privacy by opting out of data collection in popular AI apps [Sponsored]
article.summary: A recent study found that around a third of AI app users are having deeply personal conversations with the chatbots. Even if you’re not sharing your deepest fears with an AI app, your questions and conversations may still include a significant amount of personal data. A separate Stanford study found that six leading US AI companies all feed user inputs back into their models for future training, potentially putting your privacy at risk. Fortunately, there are simple steps you can take to manage this … more…
article.title_zh: 如何透過在熱門 AI 應用中選擇退出資料收集來保護隱私 [贊助]
article.summary_zh: 一項最近的研究發現，約三分之一的 AI 應用使用者與聊天機器人進行深度個人對話。即使你沒有與 AI 應用分享最深層的恐懼，你的問題和對話仍可能包含大量個人資料。

article.title: Anthropic launches Claude Design following Opus 4.7 model upgrade
article.summary: After two previous design-related updates this week, Anthropic is out with a new product today: Claude Design. The new Claude Design joins an existing suite of Mac tools, including Claude Cowork and Claude Code. more…
article.title_zh: Anthropic 在推出 Opus 4.7 模型升級後推出 Claude Design
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 今日推出新產品 Claude Design，加入現有的 Mac 工具套件中的 Claude Cowork 和 Claude Code。

article.title: Notebooks are now available for free Gemini app users
article.summary: After rolling out to Google AI subscribers earlier this month , the Gemini app has now launched notebooks to free users. more…

article.summary_zh: Gemini 應用於本月早前向 Google AI 訂閱者推出 Notebooks 後，現已向免費用戶推出。

article.title: Techie buys fake Ledger Nano S+ hardware crypto wallet and almost falls for phishing — a convincing clone would have caught newbies unaware
article.summary: Cybersecurity expert finds counterfeit Ledger Nano S+ hardware wallets being sold in China.
article.title_zh: 科技迷購買假的Ledger Nano S+硬體加密錢包險些中釣——逼真複製品會迷惑新手
article.summary_zh: 網路安全專家發現在中國銷售的假冒Ledger Nano S+硬體錢包。

article.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang ‘nearly lost his composure’ when pressed on selling chips to China — ‘You’re not talking to someone who woke up a loser’
article.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said that blocking China, the second biggest market for AI chips, from buying from American companies is a "losing proposition" that makes no sense to him.
article.title_zh: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang在被追問向中國銷售晶片時「幾乎失去冷靜」——「你說話的對象不是一個失敗者」
article.summary_zh: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang表示，禁止第二大AI晶片市場中國從美國公司購買是「賠錢的提議」，對他沒有意義。

article.title: iOS 27 rumored to bring new design changes in two key areas
article.summary: The next major iPhone software update, iOS 27, will be unveiled on June 8 , and rumors indicate it will bring at least two changes for the Liquid Glass design. more…
article.title_zh: iOS 27 傳聞將在兩個關鍵領域帶來新設計變化
article.summary_zh: 下一個重大 iPhone 軟體更新 iOS 27 將於 6 月 8 日發布，傳言稱將帶來至少兩項 Liquid Glass 設計改變。

article.title: The latest Android Canary build is hitting older Pixel phones, foldables, and tablets
article.summary: TL;DR Android Canary 2604 launched for the Google Pixel 8 series and newer this week, but users of older Pixels were left waiting. Google confirmed Android Canary 2604 is now available for the Pixel 6 series, Pixel 7 series, Pixel Fold, and Pixel Tablet as of today. The latest Android Canary build adds a few user-facing changes, though it’s highly experimental and shouldn’t be installed on primary devices. Google released April’s experimental Android Canary build earlier this week, but only for select devices. The initial rollout of Android Canary 2604 (ZP11.260320.007) only included OTA images for the Google Pixel 8 series and newer, excluding the older Pixel 6 series, Pixel 7 series, Pixel Fold, and Pixel Tablet. At the time, Google said OTA images for those devices would come at a later
article.title_zh: 最新 Android Canary 版本已推送至較舊 Pixel 手機、折疊機和平板電腦
article.summary_zh: Android Canary 2604 本週推出後，Google 現已確認其在 Pixel 6、Pixel 7、Pixel Fold 和 Pixel Tablet 上可用。
